channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nicole Kidman Has a Team of Researchers to Help Understand “Lioness” Scripts: Like 'Doing a Thesis in the CIA'
item.description: "You're constantly treading in these minefields, and you've got to keep up, like, really keep up, because it's really hard to follow," she said

item.title: Inside the Real-Life Loves of the “Running Point” Cast
item.description: Many of the 'Running Point' cast members have been in long-term relationships off-screen

item.title: Willie Geist Reflects on 10 Years of “Sunday Today ”and How He Convinced His Wife to Let Him Work 6 Days a Week (Exclusive)
item.description: April marks a decade since the NBC morning show launched its 'Sunday Today' program, helmed by Geist

item.title: Is MGK’s New Song 'Fix Ur Face' Taking Aim at Yungblud and the Osbournes?
item.description: MGK released "Fix Ur Face" on April 21

item.title: Alicia Silverstone's “Clueless” Sequel TV Series Scrapped by Peacock: Reports
item.description: The series was first announced in April 2025 and was set to star Alicia Silverstone as her iconic character, Cher Horowitz

item.title: Grindr Exec Joe Hack Says Trump Admin Officials Are Interested in D.C. Party
item.description: Grindr's White House Correspondents' Dinner weekend bash in Washington, D.C. is drawing interest from the top reaches of government ... including Pres...

item.title: Jelly Roll Accused of Death Threat Against Woman, Cops Say No Investigation
item.description: Jelly Roll is facing some heavy accusations from comedian Nicole Arbour ... but police in Nashville say they’re not exactly rushing to build a case. A...

item.title: 'Storage Wars' to Honor Darrell Sheets With In-Memoriam During New Episode
item.description: A&E will pay tribute to Darrell Sheets during this weekend's new episode of "Storage Wars" ... TMZ has learned. A network source tells TMZ ... the sho...

item.title: Paranormal Writer David Wilcock Voiced Financial Worries in 911 Call Before Death
item.description: David Wilcock's final moments are even more tragic given what he was dealing with behind the scenes ... 'cause cops tell TMZ he was battling serious f...

item.title: Smokey Robinson's $500M Countersuit Against 'Jane Doe' Accusers Partially Dismissed
item.description: Smokey Robinson's $500M legal clapback in an ongoing sexual-assault civil suit hit a major speed bump in court ... but it wasn't a total wipeout. A Lo...
